## Description

Describe the changes in this PR and the motivation.

## Changes
- Summary of changed files and intent.

## Companion checklist (required for role/agent changes)
- [ ] I updated or added companion files under `.github/agents/companions/<role>/` when the change affects a role/agent.
- [ ] I included a `Companion Decision Record` in the PR description and linked external evidence (URL + SHA), or marked `N/A`.
- [ ] Evidence links point to uploaded diffs/raw outputs and include a durable identifier (artifact SHA/id), or marked `N/A`.
- [ ] No probe-only artifacts or accidental spill files remain in the repo.

If this PR does not touch agent/role behavior, mark the companion checklist items as `N/A`.

## Reviewer guidance
- When reviewing agent/role changes, confirm read-after-write proof exists and that the `Companion Decision Record` is present and sensible.
